current_suggestion.pitch: Your current financial lens skews heavily toward Bitcoin and Austrian/hard-money thinking via Saylor — Ben Felix steelmans the evidence-based counterargument using peer-reviewed factor investing and market research, which sharpens your ability to stress-test those views rather than just reinforce them. He covers monetary policy, asset pricing, and long-term wealth in short solo explainer videos that cite actual academic papers, similar in rigor to how Peter Attia approaches health claims. The format is concise (typically 10-20 minutes), dense with citations, and deliberately low-hype — he engages with the same macroeconomic questions you care about from a fundamentally different epistemic starting point.
